## Summary

Describe the change in one or two sentences.

## Work Class

- [ ] Stable-line maintenance: fix, docs, CI hygiene, packaging truth, or other release-train-safe upkeep
- [ ] Feature work: additive behavior or meaningful product-surface expansion

## Release-Train Check

- [ ] This change belongs on the stable line now
- [ ] `release_gate` is green or expected to be green for this PR
- [ ] Release truth is unchanged, or the intended release effect is described below

## Context

- Related issue / milestone / slice:
- If feature work, link the scoped PR-shaped slice or milestone context:
- Release impact, if any:
